# OP_TERMINAL

> Real-time OPNet network monitor — live blocks, gas analytics, contract explorer, mempool tracking, and wallet portfolio on Bitcoin L1.

OP_TERMINAL is a zero-dependency vanilla JavaScript web application that connects directly to the OPNet testnet JSON-RPC endpoint. It provides a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring the OPNet blockchain, which enables smart contracts on Bitcoin Layer 1 using Tapscript-encoded calldata.

## Features

- **Live Block Explorer**: Real-time block fetching with transaction details, gas usage, and contract interactions
- **Gas Analytics**: Per-block gas usage chart with interactive tooltips and historical data
- **Contract Catalog**: Automatic discovery and categorization of deployed smart contracts
- **Mempool Monitor**: Real-time pending transaction count and OPNet transaction ratio
- **Wallet Integration**: OP_WALLET browser extension support with BTC balance, UTXO listing, and token holdings
- **Token Detection**: Automatic OP-20 token balance checking (MOTO, PILL, basedMOTO) with multi-address candidate resolution
- **Explorer Search**: Look up any address, transaction hash, block number, or contract
- **IndexedDB Caching**: Persistent block cache for instant page reload without re-fetching

## Technical Details

- **Stack**: Pure HTML, CSS, JavaScript (zero npm dependencies, zero build step)
- **RPC**: Connects to `https://testnet.opnet.org/api/v1/json-rpc`
- **Network**: OPNet Testnet (Signet fork), addresses use `opt1p` prefix (bech32m)
- **ABI Encoding**: SHA256 function selectors (not Keccak256), big-endian, no padding
- **Address Format**: 32-byte native addresses (not 20-byte Ethereum-style)

- [Live App](https://op-terminal.vercel.app)
- [Source Code](https://github.com/bc1plainview/op-terminal)
